text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we stroll through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, here we go again. Give me a sec.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Natie, you're here! Are you gonna try your
luck again this year?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You can cry all you want, but I won't
comfort you after I snatch away the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you seem extra fired up. Let's have a clean,
fair fight! I won't pull any punches!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's how I like... wait, as opposed to what? Are
you usually rigging this thing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'm not the same Nature I was before! I
went to the shrine a hundred times this year! I'm
definitely going to win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I have to get myself fired up. This is it—the year I...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Finally rid myself of the dishonorable title of
"Third-Prize Collector!"

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Natie has done this raffle every year since we first
got to know each other...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how many times she tries, she
always gets the third-place prize. It became the
talk of the town for a time since it was so
impressive! All that talk has mostly died down
now, though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Three, three, three! The number three follows me
around everywhere I go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But that ends today. With this beautiful raffle
ticket that I purified at the shrine a hundred times
over...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll summon all the luck in the world and win the
grand priiiiiize! Hot spring vacation, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Do it with me, Trainer! We're going to break the
curse!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grip the lever with Nice Nature, who looks full of
all manner of frustrations and even enmity, and
turn the raffle tumbler's lever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What...what did you just...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Natie... You've won. The grand-prize, the coupon
for the hot spring vacation... It's all yours!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tra... T-Trainer... I-I-I won the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And it's for a hot spring! My favorite place! Can you believe it?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I mean... ahem. Excuse me, I'm too old to get
carried away like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But wow. The gods must've finally decided to
show me some sympathy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, tell everyone about this, okay? Tell
them that Nature snatched the grand-prize.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'll put it on the front page of the
community newspaper too!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I've got the perfect headline. "Natie Redeems
Herself and Sets Off for Hot Spring Vacation
Paradise with Trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah—wait!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whaaaat?! Me and T-Trainer?! On a hot
spring vaca—

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that not what you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's r-ridiculous! Why would I go to a hot
spring with my trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gah!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
N-no, Trainer, that's not what I meant! What I was
trying to say was...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! You know what?! You take it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's not like I wanted to go to the hot
spring, anyway. I just wanted to get rid of that
stupid title!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Now that I have, I can give the coupon to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You go enjoy yourself whenever you want to.
Really... I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well! I guess I'll get the finest sirloin steak to
celebrate my victory before heading home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I decide to hold on to the coupon for now.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yes! We won the first-prize, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad. I seriously could not stand being the
"Third-Prize Collector."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What do you think of that, Gramps?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
All right, you win. That was great, Natie! With this
kinda luck, it's gonna be trophy after trophy!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um, hold on there...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's not exactly how it works... Being lucky
doesn't mean I can win...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, why am I disappointed—
choice_data_list:
Nature's going to win because she has what it
takes.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Haha, that's right! My apologies!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy you have such an amazing trainer,
Natie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's enough of that kind of talk! Let's go,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've got a delicious hamburger steak,
let's get back and fire up the grill!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I'll cook it for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, we enjoy a delicious hamburger steak
prepared just the way Nice Nature likes.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hnnng, so close! But I guess it's not that bad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
At least I avoided the third-prize. Yeah, I'm
calling it a win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
At any rate... I never realized how big a bushel
was. Aren't you being a bit too generous?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Well, the raffle is the main attraction of this
shopping district! We gotta go all out with things
like this if we want to go...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
"Viral," was it? Natie, you should take a photo of
this and post it on your social mixer too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You mean "social media." It's touching seeing you
working so hard to keep up with the times,
Gramps.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Can you take a photo for me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to capture this mind-boggling amount of
carrots, along with me and the old man.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It's not like I have any influence or anything,
but I can at least tell my friends about it.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Natie... you're such a good kid. I still remember
when you were just a tot...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You didn't know me when I was a kid, silly. Come
on, smile for the camera!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I snap a picture Nice Nature with a big
smile, holding a mound of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You've extended your record, unfortunately. I'm
sorry, but it is what it is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Welp, I did it again. I've gotta accept defeat.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to suspect that this is some sort of
superpower at this point. Should I donate myself
to a lab?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Juuust kidding. It's just a game, right? Thanks for
the carrot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Crunch into sweetness galore! They say fresh
carrots are the best carrots!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yup, that's the stuff, I'm feeling rejuvenated
already! Ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: ...She's frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, despite her wishes, Nice Nature once
again defends her title of "Third-Prize Collector."

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tissues? I don't even know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess this one is the most practical, which isn't
so bad, but...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You even said you went to the shrine a hundred
times. I'm kinda sad that I couldn't see a miracle
either.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
C-can you not? I kinda feel guilty. But more than
anything...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's super embarrassing! Why did I say all those
things in the heat of the moment?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You summoned all the luck in the world...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah! Stop! Forget what I said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The people of the shopping district tease Nice
Nature, wearing her out.
